CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants Mh Hospitality Of Ca, Llc Dba The Market Hall; Anthony Riviera, Individually And Dba The Market Hall.
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kaipo K.B. Young, Esq. of Leader-Picone & Young, LLP, T:510.444.2404ext23, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.'S Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants MH Hospitality Of CA, LLC dba The Market Hall; Anthony Riviera, Individually And dba The Market Hall is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

ORDER and JUDGMENT signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
